nodes.name: alembic.ini
nodes.summary: Alembic migration configuration pointing to SQLite database at data/oristudio.db, with script_location set to the alembic directory and logging levels for root, sqlalchemy, and alembic loggers.

nodes.name: pyproject.toml
nodes.summary: Python project configuration for oristudio v0.1.0 specifying FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, Celery, Redis, and other dependencies with Python 3.11+ requirement and setuptools build backend.

nodes.name: requirements.txt
nodes.summary: Pip requirements file listing all production dependencies for the oristudio backend, mirroring pyproject.toml dependency specifications.
